zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Brandling於1448年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾塞爾比時，她的父親John Brandling26歲，母親Mrs. John Brandling22歲。她於大約1474年與Walter Selby結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Brandling was born in 1448, in Selby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Brandling, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. John Brandling, was 22. She married Walter Selby about 1474. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

fr.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Brandling est née en 1448, à Selby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Brandling, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Brandling, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Selby environ 1474. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Brandling(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셀비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Brandling(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Brandling(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1474년 Walter Selby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Brandling родилась в 1448 г. в местности селби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Brandling было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Brandling, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Selby около 1474 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе.
